testcase.name: testContinuationLogic
testcase.system-out: 02:58:21.406 [main] INFO com.jiedan.service.ai.ChatContinuationSimpleTest -- ========== 测试续传机制核心逻辑 ========== 02:58:21.412 [main] INFO com.jiedan.service.ai.ChatContinuationSimpleTest -- 输入长度: 2972 字符 02:58:21.414 [main] INFO com.jiedan.service.ai.ChatContinuationSimpleTest -- 开始模拟续传过程... 02:58:21.414 [main] INFO com.jiedan.service.ai.ChatContinuationSimpleTest -- 第1次生成... 02:58:21.415 [main] INFO com.jiedan.service.ai.ChatContinuationSimpleTest -- 内容被截断，触发续传机制 02:58:21.415 [main] INFO com.jiedan.service.ai.ChatContinuationSimpleTest -- 第2次生成... 02:58:21.415 [main] INFO com.jiedan.service.ai.ChatContinuationSimpleTest -- 内容被截断，触发续传机制 02:58:21.415 [main] INFO com.jiedan.service.ai.ChatContinuationSimpleTest -- 第3次生成... 02:58:21.415 [main] INFO com.jiedan.service.ai.ChatContinuationSimpleTest -- 续传完成，共3次调用 02:58:21.415 [main] INFO com.jiedan.service.ai.ChatContinuationSimpleTest -- 总输出长度: 2052 字符 02:58:21.421 [main] INFO com.jiedan.service.ai.ChatContinuationSimpleTest -- ✓ 结果已保存: D:\jiedan_auto_get_clients\springboot-backend\src\test\resources\continuation-test\simple-test\continuation-test-result.md 02:58:21.421 [main] INFO com.jiedan.service.ai.ChatContinuationSimpleTest -- ✓ 续传机制核心逻辑测试通过
